name: Steamed Prawns with Black Beans (See Jup Jing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the prawns by cutting off whiskers, cutting along the top of the shell, and deveining them. Leave the shells on the prawns because this keeps the prawns more tender, tasty, and plump.
2. Wash, drain, and put the prawns in a pie pan so they are ready for steaming.
3. Wash black beans two times and mash into a paste; then add the chopped garlic.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients, EXCEPT the oil.
5. Pour the mixture over the prawns.
6. Pour oil on top of the prawns.
7. Cover and steam for 10 minutes. Serve over rice.
